bulk_decisions.decision_note: Approved all 124 incomplete attendance roster issues as legacy exceptions; do not create invented Present/Absent attendance facts and exclude these legacy gaps from rollout blocking.
Approved Unknown Entrance Level placeholder for 49 learners; HR will replace it with the confirmed placement later.

summary.rollout_disposition: Block rollout until original attendance is entered or an audited legacy exception is approved without inventing attendance facts.
Block rollout until the owner supplies an entrance level or approves the Unknown Entrance Level placeholder.
Warning only; review operationally and include in monthly follow-up.
